final_prompt.prompt:
Create an illustration of an underwater fairy-tale world.

Style/medium: needs a "梦幻童话" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Disney Renaissance hand-painted backgrounds, Hayao Miyazaki underwater dreamscapes, Art Nouveau oceanic illustration tradition; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include a mermaid swimming among coral reefs, bioluminescent jellyfish, and a sunken ship with treasure
Scene/backdrop: must include an underwater world with coral reefs, sunken ship with treasure, and light rays penetrating from the ocean surface
Lighting/mood: needs a dreamlike, ethereal underwater atmosphere with light rays from above — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant, dreamlike colorful direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
